description: Mobile-first 2048 swipe-merge tile puzzle. 4×4 grid of numeric tiles; swipe to slide all tiles in one direction; adjacent same-value tiles merge into their sum. Each tile merges at most once per swipe. New random 2 (90%) or 4 (10%) spawns after each successful move. Game over when no swipe direction would change state. Win at 2048 (configurable winValue) but player can keep going. Persists best score in localStorage. Fully Lego-composed: imports entities.swipe-tile-grid verbatim. Touch-only swipe via pointerdown + pointerup (mob-005); arrow keys for desktop fallback.
qualityNotes: Hand-crafted Lego-composed reference for recipe.swipe-merge. Demonstrates: (1) inline source-copy of GridBoard + SwipeTileGrid (verbatim, passes Lego provenance gate, marker present), (2) mobile-first portrait with 100dvh + safe-area-inset + touch-action:none on board, (3) pointerdown + pointerup with passive:false for swipe direction detection (mob-005), (4) arrow-key keyboard fallback for desktop, (5) end-game overlay with visible 'Try Again' (mac-022 web equivalent), (6) Win-state special overlay 'Keep Playing' with continue option, (7) score / best-score (localStorage persistence) / +N float popups on merge, (8) classic 2048 color palette per tile value (v2 lightest → v2048 glowing accent), (9) smoke-test stdout: SwipeTileGrid + initial state. Use as the seed when matcher picks recipe.swipe-merge.

discriminator.reasoning: Hand-crafted by platform team to fill the 2048 swipe-merge tile puzzle genre gap (no recipe + no template before this). Composes recipe.swipe-merge's required Lego (entities.swipe-tile-grid). Mobile-first portrait full-bleed with all mobile-frontend wisdom rules (mob-001..016) applied. Matcher should route 2048 / swipe-merge prompts here. antiKeywords for match-three / falling-block ensure the matcher doesn't pull this for row-clear or stacking games.
